evidence.text: These pressures showed up most concretely inside JAKALA's Activation business, which runs media, campaign, and engagement delivery for global clients. Senior planners on multi-market accounts were spending 40 to 60 percent of the week assembling data, building reports, and stress-testing hypotheses rather than making decisions. A complete optimization loop on a complex multi-channel account took 5 to 7 working days, including pulling data from 8 to 12 systems, hand-consolidating it in business intelligence tools, running scenarios, building a deck, and presenting it to the client.
